message:
bd-3mjjt.5: Unit tests for deterministic replay

18 integration tests covering the full record/replay pipeline:
- 100-event session round-trip with frame-identical verification
- Resize events mid-session preserving viewport state
- Concurrent timer events (interleaved ticks and keys)
- Evidence ledger entries match between record and replay via
  EvidenceVerifier (all 7 domains, builder round-trip, nondeterminism
  detection with field-level mismatch reporting)
- Corrupted trace file handling: empty data, invalid JSON, truncated
  gzip, partial JSONL, unknown event types
- Edge cases: paste events with unicode, gzip evidence, replayer
  advance_until with evidence, large 200-event stress test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -91,6 +91,10 @@ opentelemetry_sdk = { version = "0.31", features = ["testing"] }
 tracing-opentelemetry = "0.32"
 tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3.20", features = ["registry", "env-filter"] }
 
+[[test]]
+name = "deterministic_replay"
+required-features = ["event-trace"]
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "telemetry_bench"
 harness = false
